description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 25, 2026 at 6:10 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Sunnyvale, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Morse Avenue near E. Taylor Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound in autonomous mode on Morse Avenue when it came to a stop on a hill and then began reversing 
into a vacant parallel parking space in front of a parked SUV. The  Waymo AV transitioned to manual mode and briefly rolled backwards at 
a low speed, and the rear of the Waymo AV made contact with the front of the parked SUV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was not engaged and the Waymo AV was in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
